title: P0-2 altitude body quality lint (propose + doctor)
description: Detect dump-shaped knowledge bodies at extractKnowledge (propose) and doctor lint seams. Default warn / optional propose-gate; do not reject legitimate long structured guidelines.
action: Add dump-shaped body altitude heuristics next to the existing summary opacity guards in packages/server/src/services/extract-knowledge.ts (after summaryIsOpaque block ~L295-333): reasons body_altitude_dump / body_altitude_transcript_shape; default mode warn (return pending_path + altitude_warning) with configurable propose-gate refuse (empty pending_path + reason extract_knowledge:<slug>:body_altitude_dump). Mirror a warn-only doctor check (code knowledge_body_altitude_dump) via doctor-skill-lints or adjacent doctor knowledge body lint + i18n keys. Document altitude rules in fabric-archive/SKILL.md.

criteria: packages/server/src/services/extract-knowledge.ts exports or uses a body-altitude helper that emits reason codes including `body_altitude_dump` (or equivalent exact code string)
extract-knowledge.test.ts has at least one fixture that is dump-shaped (session transcript / multi-turn chat log style) and asserts refuse-or-warn behavior with that code
extract-knowledge.test.ts has a legitimate long structured guideline fixture that still produces non-empty pending_path
doctor surface exposes warn-only lint code containing `altitude` or `body_altitude` (rg -n 'body_altitude|altitude_dump' packages/server packages/shared/src/i18n)
convergence.verification: pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-server test -- extract-knowledge; rg -n 'body_altitude|altitude' packages/server/src/services packages/cli/templates/skills/fabric-archive packages/shared/src/i18n/locales
convergence.definition_of_done: Session-dump bodies are caught at propose/doctor with testable codes; real long guidelines still land as pending.

files.target: extractKnowledge altitude gate after summary opacity guards
files.change: Implement assessBodyAltitude(session_context, summary, type) detecting dump shapes (high turn-marker density, raw transcript headers, multi-speaker timestamps without H2 structure). Default: attach altitude_warning and still write; if FABRIC_ALTITUDE_PROPOSE_GATE=1 or fabric-config altitude_propose_gate:true, refuse with pending_path:'' and reason body_altitude_dump
Add tests: dump-shaped session_context → warn/refuse code; long structured guideline body with ## headings → accepted non-empty pending_path

files.target: corpus body altitude warn lint (or new doctor-body-altitude.ts if cleaner)
files.change: Warn-only doctor issue code knowledge_body_altitude_dump for canonical/pending bodies matching dump heuristics; never fixable_error
Register altitude body lint builder if new check is added as separate module
Document: write reusable altitude (decision/pitfall/guideline), not session dumps; propose may warn/refuse dump-shaped bodies
Mirror en keys for altitude dump lint

implementation: Study summary opacity guard pattern (summaryIsOpaque / empty pending_path return) as the refuse contract model

Define dump-shaped signals (examples): ≥3 lines matching /^(User|Assistant|Human|AI):/i; raw 'transcript' dump with timestamps; session_context length huge AND missing markdown H2 structure for type=guidelines is NOT enough alone — require dump markers
Default mode warn: write pending normally but include altitude_warning field or emit knowledge_archive_attempted with reason extract_knowledge:<slug>:body_altitude_warn
Configurable propose-gate: env FABRIC_ALTITUDE_PROPOSE_GATE=1 or config altitude_propose_gate:true → refuse like secret_detected
Tests cover dump refuse/warn + legitimate long guideline accept

success_metrics: default is warn or configurable gate, not unconditional hard reject of long bodies

reference.pattern: summary opacity guards + secret-scan refuse-with-empty-pending_path in extractKnowledge

rationale.chosen_approach: Extend extractKnowledge quality gates (already the propose choke point) rather than a new pipeline; doctor warn keeps corpus hygiene without auto-mutate.
decision_factors: Do not kill legitimate long guidelines
pending→review remains only path to canonical
rationale.tradeoffs: Heuristics may false-positive chatty but structured guidelines — mitigate by requiring dump markers, not length alone

risks: False positives on long guidelines — use dump-shape markers not pure length
Default hard-reject would break archive flow — default warn; gate opt-in
